name: CHIMERA INVESTMENT CORP
business: Chimera Investment Corporation is a diversified real estate company that invests in, originates, and manages primarily residential real estate assets, including residential mortgage loans, Agency RMBS, Non-Agency RMBS, MSRs, and other real estate-related assets. Through its subsidiary HomeXpress, it originates consumer Non-QM, investor business purpose, and QM residential mortgage loans. The company generates income from net interest income on its investment portfolio, fees from third-party investment management and advisory services, and gains from loan origination and sales.
sellsTo: Clients of non-discretionary investment management and advisory services

exposures.sentence: We are a diversified real estate company that invests in, originates, and manages primarily residential real estate assets.
Also, through our wholly-owned subsidiary, HomeXpress, we originate consumer Non-QM and investor business purpose residential mortgage loans as well as QM residential mortgage loans.

catalysts.event: Call and re-securitize or sell loans from NR securitizations in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to call, and if market conditions are appropriate, either sell loans or re-securitize our NR securitizations, as well as some of our R securitizations, in 2026.
